summary: Completed testing of Collection Organizer feature in Site Map & Link Manager. All 17 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend features verified: Collection Organizer tab appears as 3rd icon in view toggle, supplier dropdown loads suppliers with series counts, selecting Plus39 loads 4 series (Travertine, Burlington, Artisan, Moonlight), category groups render as drop zones with their sub-categories, drag-and-drop assigns series to categories, assignment badges appear on series cards, X button triggers unassignment with toast notifications.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Plus39 supplier data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Collection Organizer feature fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/suppliers (returns suppliers with series_count), GET /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/series?supplier=Plus39 (returns series with product counts and assignments), GET /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/category-tree (returns category groups with their categories), POST /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/assign (assigns series to category), POST /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/unassign (removes assignment). Frontend uses @hello-pangea/dnd for drag-and-drop. Drop zone IDs follow pattern 'group_slug::category_name'. Plus39 has 4 series: Travertine, Burlington, Artisan, Moonlight.

backend: GET /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/suppliers - returns suppliers with total_products and series_count
GET /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/series?supplier=Plus39 - returns series with count, sample_image, assignments
GET /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/category-tree - returns category groups with their categories
POST /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/assign - assigns series to category, updates product_group/main_category/sub_categories
POST /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/unassign - removes category assignment from series
Validation: assign requires supplier, series, group_slug, main_category
Validation: unassign requires supplier and series
Full workflow: assign -> verify -> unassign -> verify
frontend: Collection Organizer tab appears as 3rd icon (FolderTree) in SiteMapManager view toggle
Supplier dropdown loads suppliers with product counts and series counts
Selecting Plus39 loads 4 series cards (Travertine, Burlington, Artisan, Moonlight)
Series cards show product count and sample image placeholder
Category groups render as expandable drop zones (Tiles, Underfloor Heating, Materials, Tools, Accessories)
Each category group shows its sub-categories as individual drop zones
Drag a series card to a category drop zone triggers assignment API call
Toast notification confirms assignment (e.g., 'Assigned Travertine to Underfloor Heating > UFH Accessories')
Assignment badges appear on series cards after assignment
X button on badge triggers unassignment API call
